nodes.description: 'Criminals, by nature, are a cowardly and superstitious lot. To instill fear into their hearts, I became a bat. A monster in the night.   Prime 1 Studio is pleased to announce the latest addition to our Museum Masterline Series: The Batman Batcave (Black Version) Statue from Batman: Hush!   In this atmospheric, 35-inch-tall statue, Batman, surrounded by his familiars, glides past a computer console to emerge from the darkness of the Batcave! This best-selling, seminal work from Prime 1 Studio is now available in a Black and Gray version, as Batman is often portrayed.   Our dedicated artists have created Batman's iconic look, inspired by Jim Lee's phenomenal work on the Batman: Hush storyline. This statue comes with all the pieces of the Blue and Gray version: four (4) different, swappable heads, three (3) unique, swappable left hands, LED Illumination, and the intricately detailed Batcave-themed base.   Don't miss adding this Batman statue to your DC collection!
nodes.name: Batman Batcave (Black Version)

nodes.description: Sideshow and Grey Matter Art are thrilled to present The Amazing Spider-Man #700 (Variant Edition) Fine Art Print!  Featuring variant cover art for The Amazing Spider-Man #700, this limited edition print is a treasure-trove of Spidey goodness created by renowned comic artist Mr. Garcin.  Don't miss your chance to add this incredible Spider-Man art print to your Marvel gallery today!
nodes.name: The Amazing Spider-Man #700 (Variant Edition)

nodes.description: Plus Ultra! The aspiring hero Uravity, otherwise known as Ochaco Uraraka, from My Hero Academia has joined the Taito Spiritale line as a 1:7 scale figure!  Donning her hero outfit and using her Zero Gravity technique on the very base of the anime figure, the bubbly heroine lifts into the air with her phone and backpack swirling alongside her.  This Ochaco Urarake figure is a fantastic addition to any My Hero Academia collection!
nodes.name: Ochaco Uraraka

nodes.description: Stop motion master, Ray Harryhausen, pitted the noble heroes against animated skeletons in several of his movies. Ray's skeletons provide a creepy and sometimes funny villain that makes for a great action scene.  Star Ace Toys has re-created Harryhausen's skeletons as a 1:6 scale polyresin statue, armed with sword and shield, ready to take on any hero. The skeleton comes with a rocky terrain base with real grass effects.  Get multiple statues to create your own Skeleton Army today!
nodes.name: Skeleton Army (Normal Version)

nodes.description: Frame Music Girls Hatsune Miku has been turned into a robot! In a collaboration between Kotobukiya's original Frame Arms series and Hatsune Miku, Frame artist Hatsune Miku comes to life.  The design for this model was created by Takayuki Yanase based on the previously released Frame Music Girl Hatsune Miku designed by Humikane Shimada.  Brand new molds were used to realize this model's design, which has not been seen before in the Frame Arms lineup. Don't miss your chance to add this model kit to your collection today!  *Frame Architect is not included in this model kit.
nodes.name: Hatsune Miku

nodes.description: 'I save people unequally.'  From the anime series Jujutsu Kaisen comes a figma of Megumi Fushiguro!  Using the smooth yet posable joints of figma, you can create a variety of poses from the series. A flexible plastic is used for important areas, allowing proportions to be kept without compromising posability. He comes with three face plates including a standard face, a combat face, and a 'Chimera Shadow Garden' face. Optional parts include three different types of hand parts to display him making shadow puppets, his Divine Dog, and a shadow illustration sheet. An articulated figma stand is included to display the anime figure in a variety of poses.
nodes.name: Megumi Fushiguro Figma

nodes.description: 'Criminals, by nature, are a cowardly and superstitious lot. To instill fear into their hearts, I became a bat. A monster in the night.   Sideshow and Prime 1 Studio are pleased to announce the latest development in our Premium Bust Series: The Batman Batcave (Black Version) Bust from Batman: Hush!  Prime 1 Studio has heard the clamor of our dedicated fans and has worked tirelessly to release a Black and Gray version of the previous Batman: Hush Premium Bust. As any diehard Batman fans know, Batman is often portrayed as either wearing Blue and Gray or Black and Gray. This makes for a genuinely flexible product offering for the Caped Crusader!   This 8-inch-tall Black Version Premium Bust has all the crisp detail and picture-perfect paint of the previous version! Add to your DC Comics collection today!
nodes.name: Batman Batcave (Black Version)

nodes.description: Sideshow and Grey Matter Art are proud to bring you the Black Panther #1 (Variant Edition) Fine Art Print!  In stunning dark tones, our noble hero sits upon an intricate throne in this incredible print created by artist InHyuk Lee, and printed by Grey Matter Printing.   Limited to only 125, be sure to add this Black Panther print to your Marvel Fine Art gallery today!  Wakanda Forever!
nodes.name: Black Panther #1 (Variant Edition)

nodes.description: Sideshow and Super 7 present the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles ULTIMATES! Casey Jones Action Figure!  Every day is Halloween for this skating vigilante. He is fully articulated and stands at 7' tall and comes with a chock full of accessories ready to rock. Don't miss your chance to add this figure to your TMNT collection!
nodes.name: Casey Jones

nodes.description: Sideshow and Grey Matter Art are thrilled to present the Giant Sized X-Men: Tribute to Wein & Cockrum (Variant Edition) Fine Art Print!  This stunning print features art by Ed Mcguinness in tribute to the legendary one-shot comic Giant-Size X-Men #1, created by writer Len Wein and illustrator Dave Cockrum. Marvel's team of magnificent mutants would never be the same, and it is fitting that such an exciting entry into the series would inspire artists to pay homage!  Limited to only 100, X-Men fans won't want to miss out on adding this print to their Marvel gallery!
nodes.name: Giant Sized X-Men: Tribute to Wein & Cockrum (Variant Edition)

nodes.description: Sideshow and Super 7 present the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles ULTIMATES! April O' Neil Action Figure!  This fully articulated figure stands at 7' tall and is wearing her iconic yellow jumpsuit as seen in the comics and shows. Don't miss your chance to add this figure to your TMNT collection!
nodes.name: April O' Neil

nodes.description: Unmask the truth.  Sideshow and DC Comics LED Illuminated Poster Signs are proud to present the Batman™ Vengeance Batwing Illuminated Wall Light. Bring your favorite characters to life in your room with a 3FT wide brightly lit inkjet print Batwing, embedded in a solid slimline Acrylic (PMMA) body. The high-end sign illuminates the graphic and has a unique 'neon-style' edge glow that adds a magic atmosphere to any room in the house!
nodes.name: The Batman Vengeance Batwing

nodes.description: Introducing Monster chase Mini Backpack from Loungefly. This faux leather mini backpack features a metal zipper charm, glow in the dark, debossed, and printed details, as well as adjustable straps.  Be sure to add this Monster Chase Mini Backpack to your wardrobe today!
nodes.name: Monster Chase Mini Backpack

nodes.description: Introducing Stormtrooper Lenticular Mini Backpack from Loungefly. This faux leather mini backpack features an enamel zipper charm, applique, debossed, embossed, and printed details, as well as adjustable straps.  Be sure to add this Stormtrooper Lenticular Mini Backpack to your wardrobe today!
nodes.name: Stormtrooper Lenticular Mini Backpack

nodes.description: Introducing Jurassic Park Logo Mini Backpack from Loungefly. This faux leather mini backpack features an enameled zipper charm, applique, embroidered, debossed, and printed details, as well as adjustable straps.  Be sure to add this Jurassic Park Logo Mini Backpack to your wardrobe today!
nodes.name: Jurassic Park Logo Mini Backpack

nodes.description: Introducing Sargent Peppers Mini Backpack from Loungefly. This faux leather mini backpack features debossed and printed details, as well as adjustable straps.  Be sure to add this Sargent Peppers Mini Backpack to your wardrobe today!
nodes.name: Sargent Peppers Mini Backpack

nodes.description: 'Indestructible, my a**.'  Sideshow and Vice Press present the unframed Hellboy II: The Golden Army by Drew Struzan!  This 24 x 36' fine art lithograph print is hand-numbered and printed on 300gsm archival paper.  A must-have for fans of Hellboy!
nodes.name: Hellboy II: The Golden Army

nodes.description: Sideshow and Grey Matter Art are proud to bring you the Black Panther #3 (Variant Edition) Fine Art Print!  Featuring art by InHyuk Lee, this powerful image shows T'Challa standing in the foreground of a bustling scene beautifully captured in vibrant tones behind him.   Limited to only 125, be sure to add this stunning Black Panther print to your Marvel Fine Art gallery today!  Wakanda Forever!
nodes.name: Black Panther #3 (Variant Edition)

nodes.description: Sideshow and Grey Matter Art are thrilled to present The Amazing Spider-Man #15 (Variant Edition) Fine Art Print!  This incredible view of our web-slinging hero against a sky-high cityscape features art by illustrator and artist Paolo Rivera, and is printed by Grey Matter Printing.  Limited to only 175, don't miss your chance to add this Spider-Man art print to your Marvel gallery today!
nodes.name: The Amazing Spider-Man #15 (Variant Edition)

nodes.description: 'Let this remind you why you once feared the dark...'  Sideshow and Vice Press present the unframed Hellboy II: The Golden Army (Hot Foil Title) by Drew Struzan!  This 24 x 36' fine art lithograph print is hand-numbered with a gold hot foil title and printed on 300gsm archival paper.  A must-have for fans of Hellboy!
nodes.name: Hellboy II: The Golden Army (Hot Foil Title)

nodes.description: To answer power with power, the Jedi way this is not.   The Yoda™ Sixth Scale Figure, Sideshow presents. This dynamic and stylized Star Wars™ collectible is inspired by the iconic Jedi™ master's animated appearance in Star Wars: The Clone Wars™.  Judge him not by his size — the Yoda Sixth Scale Figure features an articulated body and a range of accessories to create exciting action poses from the fan-favorite animated series. His portrait is fully sculpted in the signature animation style of The Clone Wars series, carefully painted to emphasize the unique tones of his green coloration. Yoda wears a tailored fabric costume consisting of a brown shirt and pants, and a dusty outer robe with wire in the hem for dynamic posing. The figure also includes a pair of standing feet, a pair of jumping feet, a pair of relaxed hands, a pair of open gesture hands, and a pair of grip hands for interacting with his walking stick and his green lightsaber. The accompanying flight stand gives you the power to pose this wise and dexterous Jedi in energetic battle stances on your shelf.  Recruit Jedi allies when you pair Yoda with the Clone Wars-era Obi-Wan Kenobi™ Sixth Scale Figure and the Anakin Skywalker™ Sixth Scale Figure by Sideshow, each sold separately. Strong in the Force your display will be, yes.  The presence of this legendary master is sure to cast a large shadow over any fan's Star Wars collection. Bring home the Yoda Sixth Scale Figure, you must.
nodes.name: Yoda

nodes.description: Glorious purpose! – Classic Loki  Standing proudly, Classic Loki summons great levels of magic to cast a massive, miles-long realistic projection of Asgard that the monstrous Alioth attempts to feed on. Furious at the lack of nourishment, Alioth advances towards Classic Loki, who rises to his feet, and in one final display for its attention, the elder trickster shouts Glorious purpose! as Alioth devours him leaving only his golden horns behind.   Inspired by Marvel Studios' Loki series, Sideshow and Hot Toys are thrilled to introduce the highly anticipated Classic Loki Sixth Scale Collectible Figure from the Loki collection series.   Expertly crafted based on the appearance of Richard E. Grant as Classic Loki from Loki, the figure features a newly developed head sculpt with horned helmet, interchangeable face sculpts highlighting grinning and serious expressions, an iconic comic-inspired costume with screen accuracy and weathering effects applied, an array of highly-detailed accessories including Frog Thor in bottle, battle-damaged helmet, travel bag, Alligator Loki in one-sixth scale, green magic effect accessories, a character backdrop, and a themed figure stand.   The Classic Loki Sixth Scale Figure is here now to bring purpose to your glorious Marvel collection!
nodes.name: Classic Loki

nodes.description: Threezero is proud to present the next character from the G.I. Joe team, Marvin Hinton, who is also known as Roadblock! First debuting in 1984 with his formidable size and brawn, Roadblock is the heavy machine gunner in the team who can carry an M2 browning machine gun!   Standing at approximately 12 (30 cm) tall, the G.I. Joe 1:6 Roadblock collectible figure features our standard fully-articulated body with realistic seamless arms, fabric hand-tailored costuming, and high attention to detail. Presenting a highly-accurate likeness to the character as portrayed in G.I. Joe comics, Roadblock comes with a full loadout of weapons including a pistol with holster, knife with sheath, an M2 browning heavy machine gun, grenades, smoke grenades, tripod, and bullets.   Sure to please even the most hardcore G.I.Joe fans, Roadblock is one figure you won't want to miss out on!
nodes.name: Roadblock

nodes.description: Can't start the show without the star, right?   Sideshow and Premium Collectibles Studio present the Poison 1:4 Scale Statue, here to manage your roster of Street Fighter collectibles.  The Poison 1:4 Scale Statue measures 17 tall and 9 wide as the wrestling manager struts her stuff on a simple black base, rocking her signature seductive style. She strikes a confident pose with a riding crop in hand and silver cuffs chained to her denim cutoff shorts. Whether she's taking charge of the wrestling scene or jumping into the fight herself, Poison is a fierce and fiery wildcard in any match.  Inspired by her in-game character model, the Poison Statue is fully sculpted with a toned, athletic physique and her Nostalgia costume. She wears a pair of glossy red pumps, a cropped white tank top, and a black and blue chain hat resting on top of her spiky cascade of bright pink hair. Her smiling expression and bold eye makeup indicate Poison is ready for anything her rivals can throw at her — she won't even break a sweat!  Pair Poison with the Hugo 1:4 Scale Statue by Premium Collectibles Studio, sold separately, to reunite her with her wrestling associate and fellow ex-Mad Gear Gang teammate in your collection.  Crack the whip and bring home the Poison 1:4 Scale Statue by Premium Collectibles Studio today.
nodes.name: Poison

nodes.description: 'If I was your punishment, you'd already be dead.' – Kassandra  Known as the Eagle Bearer and Misthios, Kassandra the deadly Spartan mercenary of Greece would not only hunt and eliminate her prey with ease but take on powerful organizations such as the Cult of Kosmos and the Order of the Ancients as well.  Sideshow and PureArts proudly present the Assassin's Creed: Animus Kassandra 1:4 Scale Statue – one of the most requested Animus statues by fans worldwide! This stunning collectible includes two head poses and an elaborate LED-lit base featuring a massive bronze statue of Athena crumbling into the signature Animus Transition effect!  Assassins Creed fans don't miss your chance to add this beautifully sculpted statue to your collection today!
nodes.name: Animus Kassandra

nodes.description: The Unicorn, a mythical creature popularized in European folklore, has captivated the human imagination for over 2,000 years. For most of that time, well into the Middle Ages, many believed them to be real. The roots of the unicorn myth date back at least as far as 400 BCE, when the Greek historian Ctesias first documented a unicorn-like animal in his writings on the region of India.  While countless works of art have been produced depicting the mythical creature, each iteration is unique and artistic.  Our Unicorn Statue is made of high-quality resin, hand painted and it is highly detailed. The design embodies elegance, class, and will be a stylish decoration for your home!
nodes.name: Unicorn

nodes.description: Sideshow and Icon Heroes presents the Decepticon Faction Bookend from Transformers! Featuring the evil Decepticon logo, this polystone bookend measures approximately 6.2 H x 5.8 W x 2.9 D. Split them apart to hold and display your books, Blu-Ray Discs, DVDs, and more! Till all are one.
nodes.name: Decepticon Faction Bookend

nodes.description: Sideshow and Icon Heroes presents the Autobot Faction Bookend from Transformers! Featuring the heroic Autobot logo, this polystone bookend measures approximately 6.2 H x 6.3 W x 2.9 D. Split them apart to hold and display your books, Blu-Ray Discs, DVDs, and more! Till all are one.
nodes.name: Autobot Faction Bookend

nodes.description: Sideshow and Grey Matter Art are thrilled to present the Non-Stop Spider-Man #5 (Variant Edition) Fine Art Print!  This exciting high-flying view of the neighborhood's friendliest superhero features art by Kael Ngu, with printing by Grey Matter Printing.  Limited to only 150, don't miss your chance to add this web-tastic Spider-Man print to your Marvel Fine Art gallery today!
nodes.name: Non-Stop Spider-Man #5 (Variant Edition)

nodes.description: Sideshow and Grey Matter Art are thrilled to present the Venom #35 (200th Issue Variant Edition) Fine Art Print!  This veritable web of madness features art by Mr. Garcin for the landmark issue, with printing by Grey Matter Printing.  Don't miss your chance to this vibrant Venom print to your Marvel Fine Art gallery today!
nodes.name: Venom #35 (200th Issue Variant Edition)

nodes.description: Sideshow and Grey Matter Art are thrilled to present the Venom #35 (200th Issue Cover Art) Fine Art Print!  This inherently sinister print born from the cover artwork for the landmark issue of Venom #35 features art by Jock, with printing by Grey Matter Printing.  Limited to only 175, don't miss your chance to this vibrant Venom print to your Marvel Fine Art gallery today!
nodes.name: Venom #35 (200th Issue Cover Art)

nodes.description: 'Wake me when you need me.'  -Master Chief to Cortana.  It's the year 2552 and time for Master Chief to wake up and again save humanity from the Covenant.  This striking statue shows the Master Chief from Halo 3 traversing a rocky outcrop ready to deal the Covenant a fatal blow. Spartan 117 has his trusted assault rifle on his back, is holding his Energy Sword outstretched that is prepared to strike while his left hand is open and ready to deal with whoever and whatever crosses his path.  This Master Chief Statue is approximately 1:4 scale and stands about 48cm (19') tall (including the base), an impressive 60cm (23.5') wide to the tip of his Energy Sword, is made using polystone resin and is meticulously hand-crafted and painted by artisans.  Each statue comes in a deluxe full-color packaging, has a validation card and a hand-numbered base.
nodes.name: Master Chief

nodes.description: Sideshow and Nemesis Now present the James Ryan Green Cthulhu Ornament Figurine!   Exclusively designed for Nemesis Now by internationally renowned Gothic and Fantasy artist James Ryman, this monstrous figurine holds the spirit of Cthulhu. He is said to resemble a human octopus and stands hundreds of meters tall, with webbed human-looking arms and kegs and a pair of rudimentary wings on his back. It is no surprise that Lovecraftian's worship him.  In this version, the mighty deity is emerald green in color and sits atop a large monument, eyes piercing all those who gaze upon him. Cast in the finest resin before being lovingly hand-painted, this piece would make a fantastic gift for anyone who has an obsession with the classics of horror.  Don't miss your chance to add this figurine to your collection today!
nodes.name: Cthulhu

nodes.description: Sideshow and Beast Kingdom are excited to present the Chip N' Dale Statue!  Highly detailed recreation of the classic 80's Chip n' Dale Rescue Rangers characters. Fully hand molded and painted sculpture and wooden stand capturing the magic and wonder of the two cheeky chipmunks.  Exclusive limited name plaque, individually numbered for collectors to enjoy and cherish. Chi! Chi! Chi! Chip 'n Dale! That timeless tune, which blasted through our boxes during the late 1980's and beyond is now proudly conceptualized by Beast Kingdom for fans of the Rescue Rangers TV show.  The latest in the Master Craft series of high-end statues: Chip 'n Dale MC-009, finds our two pint-sized detectives in the midst of getting caught by the villainous crime boss: 'Fat Cat', with Chip covering Dale's mouth, who is surely about to let slip their location.  Standing at 13.77' in height, including the wooden base, the exquisitely painted statue further portrays the elegant and extreme attention to focus that the Master Craft series has become known for. Each cute tick, tail, and fedora is painstakingly recreated using the highest craftsmanship by the talented Beast Kingdom artists, and with individually numbered metal placards, fans are able to collect one of the cutest pairs of animated chipmunks to ever grace our screens.  Don't miss your chance of adding this limited release Master Craft Chip 'n Dale Statue to your Disney collectibles display today!
nodes.name: Chip N' Dale

nodes.description: Sideshow and First 4 Figures are proud to introduce the latest Darksiders collectible, one of the Four Horsemen of the Apocalypse and protagonist of the second game, the Death (Standard Edition) Statue!  The concept for this statue is inspired by official Darksiders II artworks, where in the majority of them, Death dons the Necromancer armor set. This is a lootable armor set in the game that increases Death's Arcane Abilities. The weapon he's wielding is his signature dual scythes, which is his starting weapon, and the base design is of the Kingdom of the Dead, which is one of the major overworlds in Darksiders II.  Another thing to note is the Amulet shards on his chest. The Amulet is a trinket that contains the souls of his Nephilim brethren he slew, and the Crowfather is the keeper of this Amulet. After Death's encounter with the Crowfather early into the game, the Amulet shatters and its fragments dig deep into Death's chest, forever serving as a reminder of the sin he committed against his kind.
nodes.name: Death (Standard Edition)

nodes.description: Tough as nails, Mandora is a by-the-book Evil Chaser First Class with the Interplanetary Control Force! This 7 scale fully articulated ThunderCats ULTIMATES! figure of Mandora features premium decoration, interchangeable heads & hands as well as multiple accessories, including her electronic boomerang! The made-to-order ThunderCats ULTIMATES! Mandora figure looks like she's ready to hop on her Electro-Charger and hunt down some intergalactic criminals, so the villains in your collection better watch out! (Electro-Charger available separately!)
nodes.name: Mandora

nodes.description: The Interplanetary Control Force's star officer, Evil Chaser First Class Mandora, doesn't chase galactic criminals in just any beat-up law enforcement cruiser, she uses the amazing Electro-Charger to bring evil-doers to justice! This highly detailed ThunderCats ULTIMATES! Electro-Charger vehicle can hold two 7 scale ULTIMATES! figures while they campaign for justice and comes with an assortment of helpful crime-fighting accessories. It also features retractable rolling, grippy wheels and kickstand as well as a clear flight stand so that it can be displayed as a planetary wheeled vehicle or in-flight as an intergalactic flying machine. Keep the bad guys on the run by adding the made-to-order Electro-Charger to your armada of ThunderCats ULTIMATES! vehicles.
nodes.name: Electro-Charger

nodes.description: Sideshow and Manas SUM are thrilled to present the haunting and beautiful Black Cicada Statue!  Perhaps one of the more romantic of the true insects, the Cicada lives on this earth for only a short time, darkening and hardening as it readies its body for its final stages. With the gift of song built into their very being, the Cicada has found its way into poetry, literature, and music as a symbol of life and death for its nature as a tragically temporary creature.  A companion to the ethereal White Cicada, this resin statue created by Chen Ziyu x Yoneyama Keisuke x Manas S+U+M would make a perfect addition for all those who love and treasure the beauty of the animal kingdom!  Be sure to add the Black Cicada statue to your collection today!
nodes.name: Black Cicada

nodes.description: Sideshow and Storm Collectibles are proud to present the Blue Mary Action Figure from The King of Fighters '98: Ultimate Match!  Blue Mary, she currently works as a freelance special agent. Born from a long line of famous fighters, Blue Mary excels in all fighting styles, and more particularly, in the Sambo Commando, a martial that uses striking and grappling techniques. Blue Mary has a strong bond with Terry Bogard.
nodes.name: Blue Mary

nodes.description: Due to popular demand, we are excited to reveal a rectangular bar featuring a full-length Han Solo™ frozen in carbonite!  This legal tender coin is beautifully engraved and shows this greatest hero of the Rebellion frozen in carbonite. An antique finish has been applied to enhance the detail. This 1oz silver coin is an impressive 60mm - with a themed box to match!   This is officially licensed, limited edition and, will be in high demand. Each has a Certificate of Authenticity to confirm it as legal tender and shows the coin's unique number in the mintage of 5,000.   Stocks are limited. So don't get left out in the cold!
nodes.name: Han Solo in Carbonite 1oz Silver Coin

nodes.description: Due to popular demand, we are excited to reveal a rectangular bar featuring a full-length Han Solo™ frozen in carbonite!  This legal tender coin is beautifully engraved and shows this greatest hero of the Rebellion frozen in carbonite. An antique finish has been applied to enhance the detail. This large 3oz silver coin is an impressive 80mm - with a supersized, themed box to match!   This is officially licensed, limited edition, and will be in high demand. Each has a Certificate of Authenticity to confirm it as legal tender and shows the coin's unique number in the mintage of 5,000.   Stocks are limited. So don't get left out in the cold!
nodes.name: Han Solo in Carbonite 3oz Silver Coin

nodes.description: Sideshow and Grey Matter Art are proud to present the Spider-Gwen & Miles Morales (Connected Variant Edition) Fine Art Giclee Print!   This dynamic hand-numbered print features both incarnations of the webbed hero, Gwen Stacy and Miles Morales, with art by Tyler Kirkham and printing by Grey Matter Printing.  Limited to only 75, don't miss your chance to add Spider-Gwen and Miles Morales to your Marvel Fine Art gallery today!
nodes.name: Spider-Gwen & Miles Morales (Connected Variant Edition)

nodes.description: Sideshow presents the BTS: Butter Fine Art Photography printed on HD Aluminum, a licensed BTS product celebrating the superstar glow of these 21st-century pop icons.   Released ahead of the debut of the CD Single Butter, this concept photo shows RM, Jin, SUGA, j-hope, Jimin, V, and Jung Kook as they lounge under orange and sea green umbrellas on a shimmering beach. This colorful print lets the boys live just like they're golden, basking in the sunshine before they jump up to dance once more.   Each HD Aluminum Metal Print comes in a durable matte black wood floating frame with a wire hanger for ease of display. This HD Aluminum Metal format enriches all the photograph's original tones with bright colors and a glossy finish, making this art a vibrant addition to your collection that is sure to melt your heart.   Ain't nothing that can stop how you move when you bring home the BTS: Butter Fine Art Photography by Sideshow today!
nodes.name: BTS: Butter

nodes.description: Sideshow and Grey Matter Art are proud to present the Miles Morales: Spider-Man #23 (Variant Edition) Fine Art Giclee Print!   This dynamic hand-numbered print features our legendary web-slinging hero Miles Morales, with art by Tyler Kirkham and printing by Grey Matter Printing.  Limited to only 125, don't miss your chance to add Miles Morales to your Marvel Fine Art gallery today!
nodes.name: Miles Morales: Spider-Man #23 (Variant Edition)

nodes.description: 'This is so Metal.'  Sideshow and Grey Matter Art are proud to present the Guardians of the Galaxy (Game Art) Fine Art Giclee Print! Featuring official game art from Eidos-Montréal's 2021 Marvel's Guardians of the Galaxy action-packed RPG, this vibrant hand-numbered print is limited to only 125 pieces and is printed by Grey Matter Printing.  Be sure to add the galaxy's coolest defenders to your Marvel gallery today!
nodes.name: Guardians of the Galaxy (Game Art)

nodes.description: Sideshow and Grey Matter Art are proud to present the Spider-Gwen (The Amazing Spider-Man #59) Variant Edition Fine Art Giclee Print!   This web-tastic hand-numbered print features art by Tyler Kirkham and is printed by Grey Matter Printing.  Limited to only 125, don't miss your chance to add Spider-Gwen to your Marvel Fine Art gallery today!
nodes.name: Spider-Gwen (The Amazing Spider-Man #59) Variant Edition

nodes.description: 'We're The Flarkin' Guardians Of The Galaxy!'  Sideshow and Grey Matter Art are proud to present the Guardians of the Galaxy Fine Art Giclee Print! Featuring game art from the 2021 Guardians of the Galaxy action-packed RPG, this vibrant hand-numbered print by Tim Tsang is limited to only 125 pieces, and is printed by Grey Matter Printing.  Be sure to add the galaxy's coolest defenders to your Marvel gallery today!
nodes.name: Guardians of the Galaxy

nodes.description: Sideshow and Medicom present Cyborg (Zack Snyder's Justice League Version) Collectible Figure! This figure stands approximately 6.29' tall and was sculpted by SH Studio / PERFECT-STUDIO.  DC Comics fans, add Cyborg to your DC collection today!
nodes.name: Cyborg (Zack Snyder’s Justice League Version)

nodes.description: Godzilla from the movie Godzilla vs. Megalon, released in 1973, is now available in DefoReal form!  The Godzilla, with its large eyes, strong facial features and comical movements, has been reproduced in deformed yet realistic detail! Please enjoy the 1973 version of Godzilla, that fought side by side with Jet Jaguar in a fierce battle against the Undersea Kingdom!
nodes.name: Godzilla (1973)

nodes.description: Star Ace's Wonders of the Wild series brings collectors the Dunkleosteus, the largest fish of the Devonian period. Living 382-358 million years ago, this fish was armored and without teeth, just a jaw of armored plates forming a blade that could cut through anything with more jaw force than any other creature of the time. Growing to almost 9 meters long and over 3.6 tonnes, the Dunkleosteus was an alpha predator, fearing nothing except other Dunkleosteus.  The sculptor has re-created this amazing ancient creature from fossils of the skull and jaws and referencing similar placoderms. This formidable fish is depicted with its jaw wide, ready to bite down on its prey. This polyresin statue has been hand-painted by the artisans at Kaibutsuya and is 42 cm long. It is mounted to an environment base with a nameplate identifying the scientific name and habitat.   Pre-Historic Creature collectors, don't miss your chance to add this Dunkleosteus Statue to your collection today!
nodes.name: Dunkleosteus (Normal Version)

nodes.description: Star Ace's Wonders of the Wild series brings collectors the Dunkleosteus, the largest fish of the Devonian period. Living 382-358 million years ago, this fish was armored and without teeth, just a jaw of armored plates forming a blade that could cut through anything with more jaw force than any other creature of the time. Growing to almost 9 meters long and over 3.6 tonnes, the Dunkleosteus was an alpha predator, fearing nothing except other Dunkleosteus.  The sculptor has re-created this amazing ancient creature from fossils of the skull and jaws and referencing similar placoderms. This formidable fish is depicted with its jaw wide, ready to bite down on its prey. This polyresin statue has been hand-painted by the artisans at Kaibutsuya and is 42 cm long. It is mounted to an environment base with a nameplate identifying the scientific name and habitat.   The Deluxe set includes a sculpted replica of the Dunkleosteus fossil as it was found by paleontologists.   Pre-Historic Creature collectors, don't miss your chance to add this Dunkleosteus Statue to your collection today!
nodes.name: Dunkleosteus (Deluxe Version)

nodes.name: Sukuna Nendoroid

nodes.description: Attacks may come from above or below, but they always come. Luckily, the X-Men moved to town.   Sideshow Art Prints presents the X-Men #1 Fine Art Print, a Marvel Comics art print by artist Felipe Massafera.  It is the nature of mutants to evolve, illustrated here in this colorful collage composition celebrating X-Men across the eras. Professor Xavier is surrounded by some of his most prolific students demonstrating their extraordinary abilities, including Storm, Rogue, Beast, Psylocke, Cyclops, Colossus, Gambit, Jean Grey, Wolverine, Forge, and Jubilee. Set against a background of classic comics panels, this powerful team isn't to be underestimated, even in a world that looks down on them.  Originally created as a retailer exclusive variant cover for X-Men #1 (2021), written by Gerry Duggan for Marvel Comics, this comic book artwork is now available as a fine art collectible for fans. Each X-Men #1 Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 350 pieces. Available unframed or in a custom framed presentation, this super hero artwork is a must-have addition to any fan's X-Men collection.  Unlock your true potential and team up with the X-Men #1 Fine Art Print by Felipe Massafera today!
nodes.name: X-Men #1

nodes.description: My armor is maneuverable, fast, and lots of fun at parties.   Sideshow presents the Iron Man Fine Art Print by Mike Mahle, a Marvel art print celebrating the innovation and genius of Tony Stark.  Showcasing the power and prestige of his futuristic tech, Iron Man raises his repulsors and invites the viewer to inspect his greatest hits. This colorful composition includes the hero's name displayed in gold letters to match his bright yellow and hot-rod red suit. Behind Tony, his Hall of Armor is on full display so that we can see every bit of tinkering and upgrading he's achieved over the years. Featured in the topmost part of his workshop is Iron Man Mark I, paying homage to Tony's origins.  Each Iron Man Fine Art Print features an embossed Seal of Authenticity and an authorized, automated artist signature. This vibrant art is available unframed and in a custom framed format in a limited edition of 400 pieces.  Put a suit of armor around your Marvel collection when you bring home the Iron Man Fine Art Print by Mike Mahle today!
nodes.name: Iron Man

nodes.description: Lanterns, light 'em up!   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Green Lantern: Brightest Day Fine Art Print, a vibrant DC Comics art print by artist Alex Garner.  Lantern Corps officers guard the universe in sectors using rings that represent their guiding principles and emotions. Based on the Brightest Day storyline in DC Comics, this colorful composition shows a fearless Hal Jordan wielding the Green Lantern ring, a testament to his willpower. He is surrounded by six of the Emotional Entities, born when the White Light was shattered by the Darkness. In the spectrum, yellow Parallax embodies fear, orange Ophidian stands for greed, the red Butcher is guided by rage, the Predator's purple form represents love, indigo Proselyte signifies compassion, and blue Adara personifies hope. In the center, piercing light from the White Lantern Power Battery divides the colors, separating their paths in life for all time.  Originally created as a variant cover to Green Lantern: Brightest Day #54 (2010), written by Geoff Johns for DC Comics, this comic book collectible is now available in a fine art format for fans. Each Green Lantern: Brightest Day Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 275 pieces. Available unframed or in a custom framed format, this super hero artwork is one that Green Lantern fans across the galaxy won't want to miss!  Even those strongest in willpower cannot resist the Green Lantern: Brightest Day Fine Art Print by Alex Garner. Add some guiding light to your DC Comics collection today!
nodes.name: Green Lantern: Brightest Day

nodes.description: I'm going to let you start running. When you're a dozen yards away, I'll try to bring you down. You could get lucky. I might miss.   Sideshow presents the Green Arrow Fine Art Print by Juan Ferreyra, a DC Comics artwork honoring the death and life of Oliver Queen.  Cloaked in his classic green hood, Green Arrow stares resolutely ahead. This powerful portrait depicts Ollie in bright white highlights as well as dark black shadows, showcasing the struggle between his identity as either hunter or hero. In front of his face, a luminous arrowhead symbolizes the vigilante's legacy as Star City's greatest archer.  Originally created as a cover for Green Arrow Rebirth Volume 1 written by Benjamin Percy for DC Comics, each Green Arrow Fine Art Print features an embossed Seal of Authenticity and an authorized, automated artist signature. This intense illustration is available unframed and in a custom framed format in a limited edition of 275 pieces.  Aim your DC Comics collection toward greatness when you bring home the Green Arrow Fine Art Print by Juan Ferreyra today!
nodes.name: Green Arrow

nodes.description: The MAN OF STEEL™ returns on a visually stunning engraved 1oz silver coin whose design heroes SUPERMAN™ in two poses. Frosted finishing of his powerful poses contrasts beautifully against a mirror background incorporating the iconic S shield. As legal tender, the effigy of Queen Elizabeth II can be found on the obverse.  This coin is beautifully engraved and shows SUPERMAN posing powerfully. This traditional 1oz silver incorporates him in flight. This is an impressive collectible, comprising themed packaging to match.   Each has a Certificate of Authenticity to confirm it as legal tender and shows the coin's unique number in its limited mintage. Laser your focus and fly in fast - these are going to be super-limited and super-demanded!
nodes.name: Superman Classic 1oz Silver Coin

nodes.description: The MAN OF STEEL™ returns on a visually stunning engraved 1/4oz gold coin whose design heroes SUPERMAN™ in two poses. Frosted finishing of his powerful poses contrasts beautifully against a mirror background incorporating the iconic S shield. As legal tender, the effigy of Queen Elizabeth II can be found on the obverse.  This coin is beautifully engraved and shows SUPERMAN posing powerfully. The ¼ oz gold coins show a close-up view of SUPERMAN beneath the iconic S shield. This is an impressive collectible, comprising themed packaging to match.   Each has a Certificate of Authenticity to confirm it as legal tender and shows the coin's unique number in its limited mintage. Laser your focus and fly in fast - these are going to be super-limited and super-demanded!
nodes.name: Superman Classic 1/4oz Gold Coin

nodes.description: The MAN OF STEEL™ returns on a visually stunning engraved 1oz silver coin whose design heroes SUPERMAN™ in two poses. This large 3oz silver coin, with an impressive 55mm diameter, has room for a further montage of classic SUPERMAN comic artwork. nodes.description: Those born of Mandalore™ strayed away from the path. Eventually, the Imperial interlopers destroyed all that we knew and loved in the Night of a Thousand Tears. – The Armorer™  Originally a proud world with a rich warrior culture, Mandalore is home to various clans of Mandalorians™. But during the Great Purge of Mandalore, the planet was bombarded by the Empire and KX Enforcer Droids were dispatched to terminate all survivors…  Sideshow and Hot Toys is delighted to introduce the KX Enforcer Droid Sixth Scale Collectible Figure inspired by The Book of Boba Fett™.  The sixth scale collectible figure stands at approximately 36cm tall, features a sophisticatedly constructed mechanical structure and weathering effects, LED light-up eyes, Separate Rolling Eyeball System, two blasters, and a rocky diorama figure base!  Your Star Wars collection will surely be enhanced with this collectible figure of the dangerous Imperial droid!
nodes.name: KX Enforcer Droid

nodes.description: People keep telling me they know me. No one does.   Sideshow presents the Rey™ Premium Format™ Figure, rising to join your galaxy of Star Wars™ collectibles.  Inspired by her character evolution in Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker™, the Rey Premium Format Figure measures 20.5 tall and 11.5 wide as the former scavenger brandishes her blue lightsaber atop the Death Star ruins, demonstrating the legacy of the Jedi teachings. Waves from the oceans of Kef Bir™ crash around the wreckage as Rey leaps to strike at her foe. The Star Wars figure also includes a Jedi Wayfinder proximity piece that can be displayed alongside the scene to guide your display in the ways of the Force.  The polystone Rey Premium Format Figure features a mixed media costume application with tailored white fabric robes enhancing the action-packed sculpt of her white bodysuit. The white lower lengths of Rey's outfit include wire in the hem for dynamic posing in the windy surf of the ocean moon of Endor. Her armbands, wraps, and boots are all sculpted and painted to simulate weathered fabric textures, and the figure wears a faux-leather belt with a pistol holster at her hip. Rey's stunning portrait captures her focus and intensity in battle and comes complete with her unique hairstyle, from delicate flyaway strands to her signature triple segment buns.  A thousand generations live in her — rise in the Force and bring home the Rey Premium Format Figure today!
nodes.name: Rey

nodes.description: My family's always been in meat.   Sideshow presents the Leatherface (Killing Mask) Sixth Scale Figure, an articulated horror figure that will make a killer addition to any collection.  Inspired by his iconic appearance in The Texas Chainsaw Massacre (1974), the Leatherface (Killing Mask) Sixth Scale Figure features a tailored fabric costume consisting of a collared shirt, black pants, a patterned necktie, and a bloodied yellow butcher's apron in addition to his sculpted black boots. A padded undersuit fills out the killer cannibal's intimidating silhouette. Leatherface's namesake portrait is unsettlingly detailed with sallow coloration on the false skin exterior, wild hair atop the head, and disturbing stitched elements all sculpted to capture his haunting appearance.  The Leatherface (Killing Mask) Sixth Scale Figure includes several accessories and alternate sets of hands for switching up the slaughter in your collection. Bubba Sawyer comes with his signature chainsaw and a mallet, ideal for chasing intruders off the family property, and four pairs of left and right hands — fists, neutral hands, grip hands, and gesture hands — for interacting with his tools of the trade. A charm bracelet accent for the figure's wrist completes his frightening look.  Get ready to 'meat' your match — add the Leatherface (Killing Mask) Sixth Scale Figure to your shelf of horror icons today!
nodes.name: Leatherface (Killing Mask)

nodes.description: The dark side is in our nature. Surrender to it.   Sideshow presents the Kylo Ren™ Premium Format™ Figure, rising to join your galaxy of Star Wars™ collectibles.  Inspired by his character evolution in Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker™, the Kylo Ren Premium Format Figure measures 21.85 tall and 18 wide as the Supreme Leader of the First Order stands with his iconic lightsaber in his hand, beckoning for Rey™ to join her power with his. He stands atop the Death Star ruins as waves from the oceans of Kef Bir™ crash around him and the winds tousle his jet-black hair, capturing a moment of tension before action and connection in confusion.  The polystone Kylo Ren Premium Format Figure features a mixed media costume application with a tailored black fabric cloak giving this Star Wars statue an even more dramatic appearance. Wiring in the cape allows collectors to pose it dynamically, working with the visual storytelling to emphasize the wind and storms rolling across the ocean moon. Kylo Ren's black bodysuit is fully sculpted with quilted textures and realistic folds and movement to add depth to the display. The figure also includes two portraits — Kylo's unhelmeted portrait features an incredible likeness and a detailed scar running across his face, while the helmeted portrait features the striking red repair lines added when the helmet was pieced back together after a fit of rage.  Pair Kylo Ren with the Rey™ Premium Format™ Figure by Sideshow to create a dyad in your Star Wars collection and celebrate the latest generation of the Skywalker™ legacy.  Accept your destiny and join forces with the Kylo Ren Premium Format Figure today!
nodes.name: Kylo Ren
